title: Slimemike's Stackable Items
body:
________________________________________________________________________________________________ ![What is stackable items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbcdb8d676caf21c70eba48cd0ab2b5a9a636511.png) Stackable Items is a texture pack that makes some items stackable when you have more then one. Some items will show the amount of the item that is in the stack. Textures will update to the quantity of some items (Some will double or more the more you hold more of that item) ![Buckets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c793bf37b51f992f0d5ed8eebe2f9e0c6099babf.png) (Some will change it's look more you hold) ![Pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f32535aa9c41ccc2bb3c1ff6ea92d32639480393.png)
List of items - Amethyst Shard - Allium - Apple (Normal, Golden and Enchanted) - Armadillo Scute - Arrows (Normal, Spectral and Tipped) - Bamboo - Beef - Beetroot - Bell - Blaze Powder - Blaze Rods - Bone - Bone Meal - Book - Bottles (Glass, Honey, Experience, Dragon Breath, Ominous) - Bowl - Bread - Breeze Rod - Brick - Brown Mushroom - Bucket - Cactus Flower - Candles - Carrot (Normal and Golden) - Chain - Chicken (Normal and Cooked) - Chours (Fruit and Popped) - ClayBall - Coal (Normal and Charcoal) - Cod (Normal and Cooked) - Cookie - Copper Chains - Copper Ingot - Copper Lantern - Copper Nugget - Cornflower - Crimson Fungus - Diamond - Doors - Dried Kelp - Dyes - Echo Shard - Egg (Normal, Blue and Brown) - Emerald - Ender Pearl - Eyes of Ender - Feather - Fire Change - Fireworks - Flint - Flower Pot - Ghast Tear - Glow Berries - Glowstone - Gold Ingot - Gold Nugget - Gun Powder - Heart of the Sea - Honeycomb - Hopper - Ink Sac (Normal and Glowing) - Iron Ingot - Iron Nugget - Item Frame (Normal and Glowing) - Kelp - Lantern - Lapis - Lead - Leaf Litter - Leather - Magma Cream - Mangrove Propagule - Map - Melon (Normal and Glistering) - Mutton (Normal and Cooked) - Name Tag - Nautilus Shell - Nether Brick - Nether Star - Nether Wart - Netherite Ingot - Oxeye Daisy - Painting - Paper - Phantom Membrane - Pink Petals - Pitcher Pod - Pointed Dripstone - Pork (Normal and Cooked) - Potato (Normal, Baked, Poisonous) - Pottery Sherd - Prismarine (Crystals and Shard) - Pufferfish - Pumpkin Pie - Quartz - Rabbit (Normal and Cooked) - Rabbit Foot - Rabbit Hide - Raw Copper - Raw Gold - Raw Iron - Red mushroom - Redstone Dust - Redstone (Compartor and Repeater) - Resin (Clump and Brick) - Rotten Flesh - Salmon (Normal and Cooked) - Sea Pickle - Seeds (Beetroot, Cocoa, Melon, Pumpkin, Torchflower, Wheat) - Shulker Shell - Signs (Normal and Hanging) - Slimeball - Smithing Template - Snowball - Spider Eye (Normal and Fermented) - Stick - Sting - Sugar - Sugar Cane - Sweet Berries - Trial Keys - Tropical Fish - Turtle Egg - Turtle Scute - Warped Fungus - Wheat - Wildflowers
________________________________________________________________________________________________ ![What it will work on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f8e7ca4f3275d6a3f0eb6dcb495e652e68f0b0a.png) - Compatible with 1.21.5 and above - Optifine or Cit Resewn is Required if 1.21.4 and below - This is only for Java Edition ________________________________________________________________________________________________ ![The terms of use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a599529fa47870fd43c6f3f696d386dd53c5288.png) (Fell free to swap the textures with your own for your personal use) Do not repost this resource pack file on another page without authorization Found any glitches or error let me know [Twitter/X @SIimemike](https://x.com/SIimemike) ________________________________________________________________________________________________
